name: agent-labbook
description: Bind a Codex or Claude Code project to selected Notion pages and data sources through the official Notion API.

interface.shortDescription: Connect a project to selected Notion pages and data sources, keep tokens local, and use the official Notion API directly.
interface.longDescription: Agent Labbook handles Notion auth and project binding for Codex, Claude Code, and other MCP clients. The default hosted backend at labbook.superplanner.net is privacy-friendly: it only handles OAuth and token refresh, while long-lived tokens and bindings stay local in `.labbook/`.
defaultPrompt: Check whether this project already has a saved Notion public-integration session and bound Notion resources.
Use the browser auth flow when this project is not authorized yet, or start a headless auth flow if opening a browser locally is not possible.
Bind one or more existing Notion pages or data sources to this project.
Return the Notion access token, headers, and bound resource IDs so the official Notion REST API can be used directly.
